parsed.production_notes: The image is a composite graphic combining a standard studio photograph of a woman with a text-heavy layout. The photographic element appears to be standard stock imagery.

scenes.setting: Studio portrait against a plain grey background, integrated into a white graphic layout with a purple border.

panels.panel_visual_description: A studio portrait of a young woman is partially visible on the right side. She has dark hair pulled back and wears a red v-neck top over a black undershirt. Her hand rests gently near her chin against a plain light grey background.

scenes.visual_description: A composite graphic framed by a thick purple border. The left side features a white background filled with black promotional text and a brand logo. The right side displays a vertically cropped studio portrait of a woman looking thoughtfully toward the text.
scenes.audio_transcript: Narrator says: Started running on 14 May 2026.
scenes.on_screen_text: SPEAK BETTER ENGLISH IN 12 WEEKS with BoldVoice. We are looking for people who NEED to improve their English pronunciation. We will help you speak English clearly and confidently for advancing your career, speaking with family, or expanding your knowledge. Just install this app and use it for 10 minutes a day and transform yourself in the next 12 weeks.
